source_evidence.quote: Drawing plans are handled as one PDF while applications, calculations, and other supporting documents are uploaded as separate PDFs.
Contractor license information on a DevHub profile can affect available standard trade permit fixture options.
The guide describes dynamic questions, uploads, acknowledgements, certification, submission, and post-submission status review.
Some permit request paths are handled outside DevHub and require email or other manual submission guidance.
Fee payment is a financial workflow and requires separate guardrails.

rehearsed_impacts.impact: Adds a proposed document preparation stage before upload staging.
Records automated final submission as unsupported for process-model automation.
